productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Training Waist Pouch
description: Style Note When making a trip where traveling lite is an essential, this waist pouch from nike will come in handy. On shopping trips or when touring around, this small pouch has enough space to hold your essentials and can be stylishly worn around your waist making it a stylish accessory. Product Details A black and grey camouflage waist pouch with orange highlights and an orange Nike print and swoosh in the front One adjustable strap to be worn around the waist One main zippered compartment One small zippered compartment at the back Two small zippered compartments on the sides Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care 100% polyester Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 14 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 14 cm
